release_notes.note: The n_cases field records the number of valid evaluation artifacts used in each aggregate.
Accepted manuscript tables are kept separate from recomputed helper tables.
Legacy development outputs are excluded from the curated paper tables.
The recomputed helper table includes both sample and population standard deviations for auditing accepted manuscript values.
The released evaluator defaults to strict evidence matching; legacy semantic compatibility matching requires an explicit switch.
main_table_medium_strict_recheck.csv applies the released strict evaluator to the same saved medium-scale artifacts as a conservative audit table.
